title: Four Ways to Die in My Hometown
original_title: 我故乡的四种死亡方式
overview: The effect of people moving away from the Chinese countryside, portrayed in poetic, occasionally stunning and often magical scenes. A student returns to her birthplace because she has a premonition that her father, who has already been in his coffin for seven years, is dying.
